kept.text:
If you only remember one sentence: In times of geopolitical and macroeconomic uncertainty, investment logic should resemble "risk control" rather than "betting."

I've seen too many "correct answers in the heat of the moment." Real returns come from: margin of safety + stable cash flow + a pace you can maintain.

Today's list of US tech/cloud computing stocks:

Microsoft (MSFT)
Salesforce (CRM)
Adobe (ADBE)
ServiceNow (NOW)
Datadog (DDOG)
Snowflake (SNOW) True success in US stocks comes from two steps: first, discovering quality stocks, then making disciplined choices at the right time.

👍If you like the content, follow us; comment "8" to receive the next quality stock code.
